RepoClean 1.1.1+81651c9848b87f5b1929032c8e3491817bad5ebf
Copyright (C) 2026 Kristian Skov Johansen

  t, target       (Default: ) Target path to clean

  r, recursive    (Default: false) Clean from folders and all subfolders

  f, forced       (Default: false) Do not ask before deleting

  s, show         (Default: false) Only display the ones that would be deleted,
                  but dont actually delete any.

  e, extra        Extra set of patterns to look for

  help            Display more information on a specific command.

  version         Display version information.
